text.message: what did i do to deserve such torture of a game
as if you traded any you hoarder

then don't complain that he blocked it
I mean I am a genius

Whoever gets road wins this game
sheep does nothing for him red block wheat and blue runs another knight
brother let me lose in peace

i'm better than you and my rank reflects it
I guess not a strong showing
i guess taking 30 turns to be able to settle here does this to a man
I need 2 sheep to take road
Purple just gonna win if you keep listening to him
